name: tink-opt-in-guards
description: Guard templates promoted from repeated verification failures. These are examples only until the user explicitly opts in.

guards.purpose: Block finishing a release/publish/deploy run when required contract checks are missing or failed.
blocks_when: contract.task_type is release, publish, or deploy
a required verification command is missing, failed, or manually skipped without approval

guards.purpose: Block writes to paths listed in contract.forbidden after a project opts in.
blocks_when: tool action writes a path matched by contract.forbidden
